findings.claim: Users report that AI features now dominate the homepage and primary interface, replacing customizable layouts they previously created
Users cannot disable or opt-out of AI feature visibility, with persistent 'Ask AI' prompts appearing throughout the interface
Multiple users report degraded search performance and increased app slowness attributed to AI integration
Long-time users are actively migrating to competing platforms specifically due to forced AI features
Users perceive aggressive upselling of paid AI features as spam that interferes with their workflow
Users consistently praise Notion's versatility for organizing multiple life domains (work, school, personal projects, budgeting, recipes)
Multiple users report improved academic performance and productivity after adopting Notion
Learning curve exists but users find value once they master the app's features
Users report the app crashes immediately on launch or fails to open, particularly after updates
Users are stuck in an uninterruptible onboarding tutorial that prevents app access
Recent updates introduce new crashes and workflow-breaking bugs on mobile
App crashes during active use, causing work loss and productivity disruption
Users cannot access app support because support links open the crashing app
Apple Pencil handwriting input is broken or non-functional for users attempting to write text, with reports of text not appearing, missing spaces between words, or writing not registering at all
Users expect native inking/drawing features to annotate diagrams and papers, explicitly comparing the app unfavorably to GoodNotes and Notability which offer this functionality
Apple Pencil interaction behavior is erratic, including unintended typing on wrong lines, scrolling triggering text input, and UI controls requiring multiple taps to activate
Apple Pencil Scribble feature (system-level handwriting recognition) is reported as broken
iPad users in educational settings (students, teachers) represent a significant affected segment, with one user estimating 60-70% of students have writable devices
Users cannot complete editing workflows without force-closing the iOS app, with freezing occurring during template editing, page building, and typing
iPad app exhibits severe lag and unresponsiveness, with users reporting deleted work and inability to select items correctly
Pages refresh repeatedly during modification, preventing users from scrolling or making changes to databases and lists
Performance issues affect both free and paid subscription users across iPhone and iPad devices
Users report progressively worsening performance over time, with scrolling lockups occurring even on simple pages
Search functionality triggers crashes on mobile
Performance issues span multiple iOS versions and device generations, including iPhone 13 mini, 8th gen iPad, iPhone 17 Pro Max on iOS 26.3
Users experience unexpected logout events that trigger complete loss of all pages, notes, and workspaces upon re-authentication
Lost data is not present in trash functionality and cannot be recovered by support team
App updates appear to correlate with unexpected logout and subsequent data loss events
Users report losing critical time-sensitive data including exam materials due within 2 days, university lecture notes 1 month before finals, and multi-year work spanning 3+ years
25 of 29 reports are 1-star reviews, concentrated in Canada (11 reports) and Great Britain (11 reports)
Users report being prompted to pay for premium to access version history after data loss
Users report the mobile app directly ports desktop UI without mobile optimization, causing usability problems
New users struggle with onboarding and navigation, requiring external resources like YouTube to learn basic functionality
Users cannot perform basic mobile operations like copy/paste and name changes, forcing them to use desktop
Users actively prefer or exclusively use the desktop version due to mobile app limitations
Users report abandoning the product entirely due to mobile-only usage constraints
Users cannot see what they are typing because the viewport auto-scrolls or jumps to hide the active input area
The cursor appears in the wrong position or does not appear at all when users tap to place it
Text input becomes completely disabled, requiring users to force-close and restart the app to regain typing functionality
Scrolling triggers unwanted viewport jumps that reposition users to unintended page locations
External keyboard input does not work correctly on mobile, forcing users to use on-screen keyboard
Switching input methods (stylus to finger) triggers the bug that prevents further text input
Users report payment processed but subscription not recognized, blocking access to paid features
Mobile app subscription does not transfer to web application, requiring users to cancel and resubscribe
Users cannot access billing or cancellation functionality from mobile app
Users report continued billing after cancellation
Support requires screen recording proof of cancellation to process refund disputes
Support is unresponsive or uses AI chat that does not resolve billing issues
Cancellation flow captures additional payment during retention attempt
App Store subscription pricing differs from web pricing, causing user confusion
Users experience complete loss of access to their content when internet connectivity is unavailable or when Notion servers are down
Users report data loss when working offline, with content disappearing upon reconnection
The absence of offline mode is characterized as a dealbreaker causing users to abandon Notion despite appreciating other features
Users express frustration that offline access remains unaddressed despite being one of the most requested features for multiple years
Offline access limitations create problems in specific use cases including travel, areas with poor connectivity, and during server outages
Template search on iPad causes UI breakage preventing users from viewing or opening templates after search
Keyboard remains visible during template browsing on iPad, blocking template scroll and navigation
Template duplication and editing functionality fails on iPad, with edits reverting to original version
Template addition triggers crashes or glitches preventing workflow completion
UI element positioning breaks on iPad with AI button misplaced to center-left of screen
Sign-in links create infinite loops that return users to the sign-in page without granting access
Password reset functionality fails, with reset links reported as 'out of use' or looping back to sign-in
Users lose access to paid subscriptions and cannot retrieve data after being logged out
Google and Apple ID sign-in methods fail with errors including 'check internet connection' and non-functional buttons
App automatically logs users out repeatedly, sometimes within seconds of successful authentication
Users report creating unintended duplicate accounts when attempting to sign in, losing access to original data
Authentication issues concentrated in GB (15 users), CA (14 users), and AU (13 users)
External keyboard input breaks after 2-3 characters on iPad, rendering the app unusable for typing
Copy and paste functionality is broken on iPad, unlike on desktop
Screen jumps or scrolls during keyboard input, obscuring typed content
Typing lag and unresponsiveness affects iPad editing experience across multiple years
Users report Magic Keyboard and Smart Keyboard compatibility issues spanning years without resolution
14 reports originate from GB, 9 from AU, indicating geographic concentration outside US market
18 users rated the app 1-2 stars specifically citing iPad keyboard issues
Some users resort to using browser version or competitor apps due to iPad app keyboard failures
Mobile calendar view lacks month view and task visibility, forcing users to rely on desktop or external apps
Calendar event creation fails to save on iPhone, blocking core workflow
Navigation patterns in mobile calendar require excessive taps, with back button returning users to month view instead of day view
Calendar sync with Apple Calendar and Google Calendar is broken or absent on iPad and mobile, forcing users to desktop
New users report steep learning curve and lack of onboarding guidance for calendar setup
Desktop calendar view praised for showing events without clicking, while mobile shows only dots
App stability issues reported with auto-refresh and glitching during calendar use
11 users report app crashes or becomes completely unresponsive when working with large notes, requiring force-quit and relaunch
Users report pages fail to open 90% of the time, requiring multiple click attempts or app relaunches to access content
Users experience cursor disappearance and unresponsive UI after typing, preventing further note editing without force-quit
Issue affects paid users on higher-tier plans, creating revenue risk beyond basic churn
Problem manifests as page load times of 10-15 seconds before crashes occur
Issue affects both iOS app and web browser, indicating potential backend or data model problem rather than platform-specific bug
App becomes unresponsive after 10-15 minutes of editing, requiring force-close and restart
15 users gave 1-star reviews, with 12 from US/GB/CA markets
Multiple users report text is too small to read or edit comfortably on mobile
Users report app frequently times out, signs them out automatically, and crashes
Touch targets are misaligned for checkboxes and app extends beyond safe zone in landscape mode
Screen scrolls up automatically when tagging users with @, obscuring typed content
Keyboard toolbar disappears making it impossible to hide keyboard or continue editing
Tablet and Apple Pencil support described as incompatible or non-functional
Users cannot zoom, print, or adjust system font size in iOS app
Feature parity issues: mobile lacks account management and other desktop features
Gallery view photo attachments to card faces have persistent glitches across views
No iOS password manager integration or biometric login options available
45 users report the iOS/iPad app crashes, freezes, or becomes unresponsive, making it unusable
Users report the app auto-refreshes every 5-10 seconds, interrupting typing and reading workflows
iPad-specific issues reported include screen freezing, button presses not registering, and app not opening at all
Users report database views trigger infinite crash-reload loops on mobile
Users explicitly state they love desktop Notion but cannot use the mobile app, indicating platform-specific regression
14 users from GB, 14 from CA, 9 from US, and 8 from AU affected, indicating widespread geographic impact
Users report needing to repeatedly delete/reinstall the app or restart their devices as temporary workarounds
Issues persist across multiple app versions and years, with reports spanning 2021 to 2026
Users cannot adjust font size on mobile apps, creating accessibility barriers for visually impaired users
Mobile app does not support iOS Dynamic Type for system-level font scaling
Font size issues are particularly acute on iPad 12.9 inch where default text appears too small
Users find Chinese characters especially difficult to read at current mobile font sizes
Users report the workaround of increasing system-wide font size makes other apps unusable
21 reports originated from Canada, representing 43% of the 49 total items in this theme
iPad app does not support columns, forcing users to desktop despite preferring iPad as primary device
Multi-column pages render poorly on iPad with content squeezed or cut off despite sufficient screen space
Drag-and-drop functionality for moving items between columns is broken or extremely difficult on iPad
iPad app lacks widget support that users expect
Forward slash shortcuts available on web are missing from iOS app, degrading productivity
Database management tasks like deletion and table conversion are confusing or broken on iPad
Cursor disappears during typing on iPad, preventing text editing and selection
Multi-tab support is absent on iPad despite being available on desktop
Apple Pencil support is described as horrendous and effectively non-existent
iPad app lacks features available on desktop including slash commands, inline equations, and calendar
Users report the iPad app is laggy, slow, and glitchy during basic operations
Users describe the iPad experience as effectively unusable or view-only
14 users report the app becomes stuck on a loading screen, preventing access to any content
Multiple users explicitly link the loading screen issue to recent app updates
Standard troubleshooting steps including reinstallation, device restart, and force closing fail to resolve the issue
Users report the desktop version works correctly while the mobile app is broken
One user reports the app works correctly once after reinstall then breaks again
Issue affects users across Canada (5), United Kingdom (4), United States (3), and Australia (2)
4 users report app crashes, freezing, or infinite refresh issues when notes contain more text
4 users explicitly request Russian language support, with one user stating lack of Russian language prevents purchase
2 users report Turkish language support is missing and cite this as reason for not purchasing
1 user requests Apple Pencil scribble feature integration and reports language input switching issues
1 user reports forced AI button placement disrupts interface cleanliness and cannot be disabled

recommended_actions.action: Implement user-controlled toggle to completely hide AI features from interface for users who opt-out
Restore homepage customization controls to allow users to remove AI chatbot default view
Audit and reduce frequency of AI feature promotion prompts, especially during core writing/editing workflows
Investigate performance regression in search functionality reported since AI integration
Conduct user research with long-time users to understand interface principles they valued before AI rollout
Immediately roll back latest mobile app release and investigate crash logs for launch failures
Implement skip/dismiss functionality for onboarding tutorial to prevent user lockout
Establish mobile app stability regression testing before each release to catch launch crashes
Create alternative support channel accessible outside the app for users experiencing launch failures
Review mobile update QA process given pattern of new bugs introduced with each release
Audit and fix Apple Pencil input handling on iOS app to resolve text registration failures, spacing issues, and erratic touch behavior
Research feasibility of native drawing/inking canvas feature for iPad, scoping against GoodNotes and Notability feature sets
Verify Apple Pencil Scribble API integration and restore functionality if broken
Conduct user interviews with iPad/education segment to validate drawing feature prioritization and define MVP scope
Conduct performance profiling on iOS app focusing on editing workflows, page refresh triggers, and scrolling interactions to identify root causes of freezing
Instrument crash analytics specifically for force-close events to quantify frequency and identify affected user segments
Prioritize iPad-specific performance optimization, particularly for database operations and typing input handlers
Implement emergency fix for page auto-refresh behavior preventing database scrolling and drag-drop operations
Add performance regression testing for iOS app releases to prevent progressive degradation
Immediately investigate authentication flow for data loss bug, prioritizing Canadian and British user sessions from 2021-2026 timeframe
Implement emergency data recovery protocol for affected users and audit backup systems for data retention failures
Add pre-logout data integrity validation and post-login workspace verification to detect missing data before user interaction
Create automated monitoring for logout events correlated with workspace disappearance to detect future occurrences in real-time
Review app update deployment process to identify correlation between releases and data loss incidents
Conduct mobile-specific usability testing with new users to identify top 5 navigation pain points
Enable basic account settings (name change) on mobile to match desktop feature parity
Audit and redesign mobile UI for touch-first interaction patterns, tablet optimization, and gesture support
Create in-app onboarding tutorial specifically for mobile users covering core workflows
Implement mobile-optimized templates and module creation flows to reduce complexity
Immediately investigate mobile text input focus and viewport scroll behavior, prioritizing iOS and Android native keyboard integration
Add telemetry to track cursor placement failures, viewport jump events, and text input session failures on mobile
Audit external keyboard support (Magic Keyboard, Bluetooth keyboards) for cursor positioning and input handling
Test stylus-to-touch input method switching on iPad and Android tablets to reproduce input lockup
Audit subscription state sync between payment processor, mobile app, and web app to identify why paid subscriptions are not recognized
Add billing management and cancellation functionality to mobile app
Review and fix subscription platform interoperability between iOS in-app purchase and web subscriptions
Implement human support escalation path for billing disputes instead of relying solely on AI chat
Remove screen recording requirement from cancellation dispute policy
Audit cancellation flow to prevent unintended payment capture during retention messaging
Add post-payment verification step to confirm subscription entitlements are granted before charging user
Implement read-only offline access for previously viewed pages as minimum viable solution
Design and implement offline editing with conflict resolution for when users reconnect
Add visual indicators and user notifications when offline to prevent unexpected data loss
Conduct user research on offline workflow requirements and acceptable limitations for database features
Reproduce template search flow on iPad (all supported models) and fix UI breakage preventing template viewing after search
Fix keyboard dismissal behavior in template browser to allow scrolling and navigation
Debug template duplication and edit persistence on iPad to prevent revert-to-original bug
Audit and fix absolute positioning logic for AI button and other UI elements on iPad viewports
Add crash tracking specifically for template operations on iPad to capture repro steps
Immediately audit authentication flow for sign-in link generation and validation logic to identify why links loop back to sign-in page
Investigate session management on mobile app to determine root cause of automatic logouts and implement session persistence
Fix password reset email delivery and link validation to restore self-service account recovery
Review OAuth implementation for Google and Apple sign-in methods, prioritizing error handling and button functionality
Implement account recovery workflow for users locked out of paid accounts with data loss
Add geographic segmentation to error logging to investigate potential regional API or infrastructure issues in GB, CA, AU
Halt new iPad feature work and assign senior iOS engineer to reproduce and fix external keyboard input breaking after 2-3 characters
Audit iPad keyboard event handling for Magic Keyboard and Smart Keyboard, focusing on cursor state and input buffer management
Fix copy/paste functionality on iPad to match desktop parity
Investigate and fix screen jumping/auto-scroll during keyboard input on iPad
Add automated iPad keyboard interaction tests covering external keyboard typing, copy/paste, and cursor positioning
Implement iPad-specific performance monitoring for keyboard latency and responsiveness metrics
Add month view to mobile calendar with visible task/event titles (not just dots)
Fix event creation save failure on iPhone reported in item ba9052b0
Audit and fix calendar sync logic for Apple Calendar and Google Calendar on iPad/mobile
Revise mobile calendar navigation to preserve day view context when backing out of events
Ship first-run onboarding flow for calendar setup targeting new users
Investigate and resolve auto-refresh stability issues in mobile calendar
Instrument crash reporting to identify memory threshold or content size triggering iOS app crashes with large notes
Implement pagination or lazy-loading for large note content to prevent full document load on open
Add client-side size warnings or block note creation beyond tested performance limits until optimization complete
Profile page load performance for notes exceeding 10KB to identify server-side vs client-side bottlenecks
Conduct outreach to paid user reporting 90% failure rate to prevent immediate churn and gather detailed repro steps
Investigate and fix unresponsiveness/freezing after 10-15 minutes of editing session
Audit and fix touch target alignment for interactive elements (checkboxes, buttons)
Fix keyboard toolbar disappearing issue preventing keyboard dismissal
Resolve auto-scroll behavior when using @ mentions that obscures content
Implement system font size support and pinch-to-zoom for accessibility
Fix safe zone layout violations in landscape orientation
Add iOS biometric authentication (Face ID/Touch ID) and password manager integration
Conduct mobile-specific performance profiling to address timeout and crash reports
Audit feature parity gaps between mobile and desktop (account settings, print, etc.)
Fix gallery view photo persistence bug when switching between table/gallery views
Reproduce crash and auto-refresh behavior on iOS/iPadOS devices using real user database views and page structures
Implement crash reporting telemetry to identify frequency, device models, iOS versions, and triggering actions
Audit database view rendering and infinite refresh loops on mobile clients
Investigate iPad-specific touch input handling and button registration failures
Establish mobile app stability SLO and regression testing suite before releases
Implement iOS Dynamic Type support to respect system-level text size preferences
Add in-app font size control slider for mobile apps (iOS and Android)
Conduct accessibility audit of mobile app against WCAG 2.1 AA text scaling requirements
Test font rendering for non-Latin scripts (Chinese, Japanese, Korean) at various sizes
Ship column support for iPad app (most frequently requested feature across 5+ reviews)
Implement responsive layout for multi-column pages on iPad to prevent content squeezing
Fix drag-and-drop for column-based workflows on iPad touch interface
Add forward slash keyboard shortcuts to iOS app for feature parity with web
Audit database management flows (deletion, table conversion) on iPad for usability
Fix cursor disappearing bug during typing and text selection on iPad
Implement multi-tab support for iPad app matching desktop functionality
Overhaul Apple Pencil input handling to enable reliable text selection and navigation
Audit and restore feature parity between iPad and desktop for slash commands, inline equations, and calendar views
Investigate and fix keyboard not appearing when text boxes are tapped
Profile and optimize iPad app performance to address lag and sluggishness
Audit recent mobile app releases between 2021-01 and 2026-05 to identify update(s) that introduced loading screen regression
Implement telemetry to capture loading screen timeout events and associated network/API errors in mobile app
Add offline fallback support to prevent complete app failure when network requests hang
Review mobile app state persistence logic to understand why reinstall provides temporary fix before breaking again
